name: Cleric
description: A divine healer and undead-hunter. Clerics keep the party alive with group heal and resurrection and wreck the undead with turn undead and smite; note that smite only strikes undead, so bring a weapon against the living, or train searing light at level 15 for holy damage against any foe, then at level 30 sanctuary, a party-wide ward that armors and steadily mends everyone around you, and at level 45 purify, a party-wide burst of cleansing light that washes affliction away and mends the whole group, then at level 60 holy nova, the cleric's first area attack: a bursting nova of holy light that sears every foe in the room.
